items.title: Altimate Code chat lives inside Power user for dbt
items.summary: Execute, Explain, Optimize, Document, and Review on any SQL or YAML file.

items.title: RisingWave adapter support during onboarding
items.summary: Installed and configured as a Postgres-compatible dialect — no manual setup.

items.title: CTE Profiler — per-CTE timing and row counts in the editor
items.summary: Per-CTE time and row counts, decorated inline. No Altimate API key required.

items.title: Generate dbt unit tests from your manifest
items.summary: Type-correct mock data — happy path, nulls, and boundaries — written into the model's schema.

items.title: Model hovers and Run/Test codelenses in schema files
items.summary: Columns, types, and Run / Test / Document inline in schema YAML files.

items.title: dbt-aware syntax highlighting for SQL+Jinja and YAML+Jinja
items.summary: Jinja blocks, refs, and sources highlighted distinctly from surrounding SQL and YAML.

items.title: Compiled-SQL preview no longer flickers on save
items.summary: The preview pane holds its scroll position and content while a model recompiles.
